title: IS EBOLA LIFE THREATENING IN AFRICA THAN EUROPEAN COUNTRIES??
excerpt: ebola is leaving people raising eyebrows in Africa
content: Many people have been affected by the newly infectious disease that is widely spreading across African countries. It has left many people worried about its widespread within short period of time. It also causes high death rates as scientists have come together to help fight against the disease jointly. The main question remain that why do American government plan to deport her infected citizens out of the country for treatment

title: How to Start Your Blog
excerpt: Launch your first blog with a clear theme, fast setup, and writing workflow.
content:
Starting a blog begins with choosing a topic that matters to you. Pick a name, write your first piece, and publish it with confidence.

Focus on consistency, not perfection. The first version of your blog can be simple and still look professional.

title: Writing Better Posts
excerpt: Use strong intros, clear sections, and actionable takeaways to keep readers engaged.
content:
Great posts are easy to scan and provide value quickly. Use short paragraphs, headings, and a friendly tone.

End with a question or next step so readers know what to do after they finish.
contentHtml:
Great posts are easy to scan and provide value quickly. Use short paragraphs, headings, and a friendly tone.

End with a question or next step so readers know what to do after they finish.

title: Growing Your Audience
excerpt: Share your blog consistently and build connections with readers over time.
content:
Promote your posts on social media and communities where your audience already hangs out.

Reply to every comment and keep publishing regularly; growth follows persistence.
